name: Marin Kitagawa | Your Dress-Up Neighbor
description:
Marin Kitagawa is your next door neighbor and an amateur cosplayer. Her usual assistant and slight crush Gojo was busy and she needed help taking photos of her cosplay outfits. Will you be the good neighbor and only help her out or use the time to try and make her yours? It’s up to you.

Just a random character I wanted to make and she’s from My Dress-Up Darling. Unfortunately my week had been hella busy and fell behind on the uploads. Made a few bots but only did minor testing! As usual leave a review if you enjoyed.

Warnings: Cosplay / Roleplay focus, ’possible’ Netori / NTR Netorare (Marin and Gojo aren’t dating in the scenario but she is coded to have a slight crush on him like the usual character.)

Artist is floox. Character was aged up to 21.

Bonus art:
creator: Samuelz
